picks.rationale: Solana leads major crypto gains with +6.83% weekly and +0.73% daily, bucking the broader market slide; fresh DeFi activity and a +2.4% daily gain per [36crypto.com](https://36crypto.com/bitcoin-btc-slips-below-60000-while-solana-sol-leads-major-crypto-gains/) confirm relative strength.

TRX is the only major with positive YTD (+11.30%) and strong news sentiment (0.249), supported by stablecoin settlement volumes and a healthy network outlook per [analyticsinsight.net](https://www.analyticsinsight.net/price-analysis/crypto-prices-today-bitcoin-holds-near-59190-as-solana-jumps-205-ahead-of-fed-chair-warshs-ecb-remarks).
KAITO shows exceptional momentum with +31.11% weekly and +26.13% monthly, despite a small £0.105B market cap; no direct news found but the price action signals strong speculative demand.
NMR posts +6.56% daily and +5.57% monthly, showing resilience in a weak market; its small £0.051B cap offers high beta for momentum traders.
OCEAN surged +16.00% weekly, the strongest weekly gain among AI tokens, though daily dipped -3.16%; the weekly strength suggests renewed interest in data economy narratives.
XLM gains +7.98% daily and +3.91% weekly, nearly flat YTD (-0.14%), offering a relative value play with a £5.1B market cap and no negative news overhang.
ADA bounces +3.47% daily after a steep monthly decline (-35.45%), with neutral news sentiment (0.111); the daily reversal could signal a short-term bottom.
AVAX shows weekly strength (+3.45%) and a small daily gain (+0.83%), with a £2.2B market cap; no negative headlines, making it a defensive altcoin pick.
DOT edges up +1.80% daily but remains deeply negative YTD (-53.52%); the daily gain is a minor recovery in a downtrend, suitable for a low-conviction tactical trade.
MINA gains +1.47% daily with a tiny £0.038B market cap; high risk but the daily uptick in a falling market offers speculative appeal for nimble traders.

previous_picks.rationale: KAITO is the top momentum asset with +23.07% 1W and +26.92% 1M, +15.24% YTD, and a small £0.107B market cap offering high beta potential in the AI narrative.
TRX is the sole asset with positive YTD (+13.68%) and 1Y (+14%) returns, supported by strong news sentiment (0.249) and a healthy £23.2B market cap, showing resilient relative strength.
SOL shows a strong 1D bounce +3.47% and modest 1W -1.37%, with positive news sentiment 0.224 and a large £31.96B market cap, making it a leading L1 recovery play.
OCEAN has exceptional 1W momentum (+11.97%) and moderate 1M decline (-7.71%), outperforming most AI tokens. Its small cap and data-economy narrative offer asymmetric upside.
AVAX leads L1s with +5.70% 1W and +4.72% 1D gains, signaling short-term momentum reversal. A £2.16B market cap provides room for leveraged upside if momentum sustains.
TAO has minimal YTD drawdown (-5.13%) and a +0.21% 1D tick, with bullish mainstream coverage comparing it to Bitcoin's scarcity. The £1.74B market cap positions it well for AI narrative re-rating.

ETH has positive news sentiment (0.328) and a +1.06% 1D bounce; its £144B market cap makes it the core L2/liquidity proxy. Capitulation signals on BTC may precede a broader market recovery led by ETH.

BTC is range-bound near $60,100 with whale accumulation underway and analyst capitulation signals historically marking cycle bottoms. A £911B market cap provides stability; ETF outflows are a near-term headwind.
NMR has positive 1M momentum (+0.38%) despite broader AI weakness, with minimal YTD decline (-10.65%). A tiny £0.048B cap means high beta to any AI data narrative revival.
BNB holds a £56.5B market cap with modest drawdown and slight positive news sentiment (0.06). It remains a liquid exchange-backed L1 with potential to stabilise as crypto risk appetite returns.
